description: India Book III, 26: Calendar written by Ibn Yiju for the year September 1149–September 1150, when he was in Yemen. The document seems to indicate that he planned to organize and lead a private service in Yemen, as he had done before in India and would do later in Egypt.
tags: India, ib-untranslated-eng, calendar, Ibn Yiju, IB3
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
